summary: Q038-Q045 are consistent with the single-seed contract batch: one fixed seed per run, seed/title alignment, and a sensible cost note. The main review risk is file-level integrity of the generated question JSONs, which did not round-trip cleanly as complete files during validation.

outputs.description: Contract review for Q038-Q045 seed batch

accepted_fields_or_changes: One fixed seed per run is respected in Q038-Q045: each row uses only S_PORTAL_KOREA_UNIV and does not introduce cross-seed synthesis.
S_PORTAL_KOREA_UNIV is a reasonable primary seed for this block: the org/title/project all point at the same Korean university portal procurement, which matches the contract-field focus.
The cost note is good and actionable: resolved-primary for cheap smoke, multiturn-primary for faithful follow-up and memory tests.

The selected-project contract fields are broadly suitable for these six cases: target_orgs, target_biz, expect_abstention, seed_refs, gates, and metric_routes all line up with the intended evaluation mode.
rejected_or_risky_items: The generated primary/resolved question files should get a final integrity pass as complete artifacts; full-file JSON parsing failed during review even though the Q038-Q045 slice looked coherent.
All reviewed cases reuse the same seed, so the batch is narrow by design; that is fine for a fixed-seed contract review, but not for diversity coverage.
Q043-Q045 are a slightly softer fit than Q038-Q042 for strict contract-field probing, so they are acceptable but not the strongest examples in the slice.
needs_orchestrator_review: Confirm whether the generated question files are intended to be complete JSON artifacts or only partial review fixtures; if complete, rerun validation on the full files before downstream use.

commands_run: ConvertFrom-Json attempted on both generated question files
observed_results: Q038-Q045 entries are present in both generated files with matching source_case_id values and matching seed_refs/seed_titles.
The batch manifest shows the same one-fixed-seed policy and the cost note for the run.
Full-file ConvertFrom-Json failed on both generated question files, so the overall artifact integrity still needs a pass.
